6a26960d9096c01ba76af564.name: chatpulse
6a26960d9096c01ba76af564.use_case: This tool continuously monitors your applications and modules for errors every 20 mins (configurable)). It collects logs from Graylog, classifies failures with AI, and sends alerts (e.g. Slack) so you can fix issues quickly. You configure triggers per project (how often to run) and modules (which products to monitor).

6a224d31006916ed72e6f0aa.name: demoforge
6a224d31006916ed72e6f0aa.persona: Sales engineer or pre-sales pod member

6a4402a6f14e94517beb8474.name: Campaign Manager Demo
6a4402a6f14e94517beb8474.use_case: Send the same offer or update to many recipients at once, with personalized content, then measure delivery and engagement after the send.

6a44013ef14e94517beb846c.name: Personalize Demo
6a44013ef14e94517beb846c.use_case: Event-driven customer profile enrichment and downstream actioning.

6a43fde1f14e94517beb845f.name: AI Admin Demo
6a43fde1f14e94517beb845f.use_case: Domain-tuned LLM handles routine banking queries (balance, mini-statement, KYC status) and escalates the messy stuff to a human with full conversation context.

6a43fca8f14e94517beb8455.name: RCS Demo
6a43fca8f14e94517beb8455.use_case: Send a rich RCS card to your contact base and watch the platform fall back to SMS or WhatsApp for handsets that don't support RCS — without you writing any routing logic.

6a43fbc7f14e94517beb844a.name: CTWA Demo
6a43fbc7f14e94517beb844a.use_case: Replace a static lead form with a 60-second chat that disqualifies tyre-kickers and books warm leads on the sales calendar.

6a43f349f14e94517beb843f.name: Agent Assist Demo
6a43f349f14e94517beb843f.use_case: Live agent sees AI-suggested replies, customer-history summaries, and intent tags in real time — without leaving the inbox.

6a433c867d620401bb6774c1.name: Bot Studio
6a433c867d620401bb6774c1.use_case: Build a single conversation journey in Bot Studio and deploy it to WhatsApp, Instagram, and the web widget simultaneously — no per-channel rework.

6a38bd8d9096c01ba76af5f0.name: General Demo
6a38bd8d9096c01ba76af5f0.use_case: A bank wants to understand our Console capabilities and features. A walkthrough of the entire platform is required.
6a38bd8d9096c01ba76af5f0.persona: Head of Digital Banking / VP Retail Loans

6a0f0a368ae7349cf7bc0901.name: commerce-root-demo
6a0f0a368ae7349cf7bc0901.use_case: Launch a fully-managed WhatsApp commerce storefront for a D2C brand — product discovery, AI-led shopping assistant, cart + checkout, abandoned-cart recovery and post-purchase engagement — provisioned end-to-end (WhatsApp templates, journeys, segments, AI agent) from a single Gupshup onboarding flow, with weekly revenue tracking for the pod.
6a0f0a368ae7349cf7bc0901.industry: Retail & D2C E-commerce (also applicable to Fashion, Beauty, Grocery, Consumer Electronics).
6a0f0a368ae7349cf7bc0901.persona: Head of Digital / Growth at a D2C brand

6a0de0b48ae7349cf7bc08f0.name: Ctxdemo1
6a0de0b48ae7349cf7bc08f0.use_case: Re-engage prospects who started a loan application but didn't finish, using WhatsApp to answer questions, collect missing documents, and route to a human banker.
6a0de0b48ae7349cf7bc08f0.persona: Head of Digital Banking / VP Retail Loans
